data.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood ✓ — acli-version-resolver.sh exists and auto-resolves ACLI_VERSION+ACLI_SHA256; B3/B4 in SKILL.md currently use manual AskUserQuestion prompts that should reference the script. CLAUDE.md Jira bridge section is accurate. ADR 0001 only references ACLI_VERSION/ACLI_SHA256 in the architectural context (not setup flow) — no manual prompt flow to fix there.
